sections.title: Abstract
sections.content: This paper studies robust chunking for retrieval augmented generation systems. We compare frontmatter suppression, section-aware splitting, and paragraph reconstruction for technical PDFs.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: Technical PDFs often contain title blocks, author lists, and venue headers that should not dominate retrieval. A good chunker preserves section boundaries while reducing trivial fragments.

lines.text: Technical PDFs often contain title blocks
